description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: In the documentaries section, find beginner-friendly naturism videos 10–25 minutes long costing at most $7.50 each and add the two cheapest that together stay under $15 to your cart, then start checkout.

target_names: Introduction to Naturism: First Time at a Family Resort

tasks.name: In the documentaries section, find beginner-friendly naturism videos 10–25 minutes long costing at most $7.50 each and add the two cheapest that together stay under $15 to your cart, then start checkout.

tasks.instruction: In the documentaries section, filter to beach-themed titles available in 4K for under $12 and purchase the single longest one.
tasks.name: In the documentaries section, filter to beach-themed titles available in 4K for under $12 and purchase the single longest one.
tasks.description: In the documentaries section, filter to beach-themed titles available in 4K for under $12 and purchase the single longest one.

tasks.instruction: Create a new account, then in account settings set the interface language to English, turn on family-friendly viewing, and set the default download quality to 1080p.
tasks.name: Create a new account, then in account settings set the interface language to English, turn on family-friendly viewing, and set the default download quality to 1080p.
tasks.description: Create a new account, then in account settings set the interface language to English, turn on family-friendly viewing, and set the default download quality to 1080p.

tasks.instruction: In the clips section, filter to free festival-themed clips under 5 minutes and add the three highest-rated ones to your library.
tasks.name: In the clips section, filter to free festival-themed clips under 5 minutes and add the three highest-rated ones to your library.
tasks.description: In the clips section, filter to free festival-themed clips under 5 minutes and add the three highest-rated ones to your library.

tasks.instruction: On a resort video series page, choose the lowest-priced access option that provides at least 7 days of access for under $15 and proceed to checkout.

target_names: 7-day rental (1080p) for Summer Resort Diary series

tasks.name: On a resort video series page, choose the lowest-priced access option that provides at least 7 days of access for under $15 and proceed to checkout.
tasks.description: On a resort video series page, choose the lowest-priced access option that provides at least 7 days of access for under $15 and proceed to checkout.

tasks.instruction: From the memberships page, subscribe to a monthly plan that costs under $20 per month and includes offline downloads, paying by credit card.
tasks.name: From the memberships page, subscribe to a monthly plan that costs under $20 per month and includes offline downloads, paying by credit card.
tasks.description: From the memberships page, subscribe to a monthly plan that costs under $20 per month and includes offline downloads, paying by credit card.

tasks.instruction: In the resorts category, find a family resort video released between 2018 and 2020 that is 30–60 minutes long, rated at least 4 stars, and priced under $10, then add it to your wishlist.
tasks.name: In the resorts category, find a family resort video released between 2018 and 2020 that is 30–60 minutes long, rated at least 4 stars, and priced under $10, then add it to your wishlist.

tasks.instruction: In the festivals category, filter to 2022 European videos at least 45 minutes long with rating 4.5 or higher and 1080p purchase price up to $12.50, buy the two cheapest in 1080p, then start downloading one of them.

tasks.instruction: From your library, pick a watched video longer than 30 minutes that you have not rated yet, rate it 4 stars, and submit a written review of at least 50 characters.
